case_title: TITAN ENVIRONMENTAL SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. LOUISE GUILFO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $756.04 FILED BY TITAN ENVIRONMENTAL SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUILFO, LOUISE DREW, COLEMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SERVICE $ 74.50 - SERVED MAY-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUILFO, LOUISE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT COLEMAN DREW. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
